channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [YAJUR] Yajur Fibres Board Meeting on May 25, 2026
item.description:
Yajur Fibres Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 25, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated accounts for the half year and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window remains closed until 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 25, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of audited standalone and consolidated accounts for FY26.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post financial results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Yajur Fibres Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ANJANIFIN] Anjani Finance Board Meeting on May 25, 2026 to Approve Financial Results
item.description:
Anjani Finance Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 25, 2026, to consider and approve the standalone audited financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also review the auditor's report on these financial results. The trading window for dealing in the company’s securities is currently closed and will reopen 48 hours after the results are declared.

  • Anjani Finance board to meet on May 25, 2026.
  • Meeting to approve FY26 audited financial results.
  • Auditor's report will be reviewed at the meeting.
  • Trading window closed, reopening post-results announcement.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ANJANI FINANCE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DCMSIL] DCM Shriram International: CIN Updated to L17299DL2022PLC404291
item.description:
DCM Shriram International Ltd. announced that its Corporate Identification Number (CIN) has been updated by the Ministry of Corporate Affairs following the listing of the company's equity shares on the stock exchanges. The company's status has been formally updated from "Unlisted" to "Listed", resulting in a change in the first character of the CIN from 'U' to 'L'. The updated CIN is L17299DL2022PLC404291.

  • DCM Shriram International's CIN updated post-listing.
  • CIN changed from U17299DL2022PLC404291 to L17299DL2022PLC404291.
  • Company status updated from 'Unlisted' to 'Listed'.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DCM Shriram International Ltd | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [VAMA] Vama Industries Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
Vama Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until May 31, 2026, and will reopen on June 1, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated financial results for FY26.
  • Trading window remains closed until May 31, 2026, reopening on June 1, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VAMA INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PREMCAPM] Premium Capital Board Meeting on May 21, 2026
item.description:
Premium Capital Market & Investments Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 21, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for insiders has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026 to approve audited financial results.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office in Indore.
  • Trading window closed for insiders from April 1, 2026.
  • Closure extends until 48 hours post-results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PREMIUM CAPITAL MARKET & INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [HEALINV] Healthy Investments Ltd Board Meeting on 22 May 2026
item.description:
Healthy Investments Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited Financial Results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the re-classification of a person belonging to the promoter category to the public category and the appointment of Mr. Manish Kumar Shukla as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director.

  • Board meeting to approve audited financial results on May 22, 2026.
  • Re-classification of promoter category to public category to be considered.
  • Appointment of Mr. Manish Kumar Shukla as an Additional Non-Executive Independent Director.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HEALTHY INVESTMENTS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AVI] AVI Polymers Appoints Pushpa Joshi as Non-Exec Director
item.description:
AVI Polymers Ltd has appointed Ms. Pushpa Joshi (DIN - 06838093) as a Non-Executive Independent Director (Additional) effective May 18, 2026, for a five-year term, subject to shareholder approval. Ms. Joshi's appointment follows the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee. She brings experience in accounting, administration, and office operations. She is not related to any existing directors and is not debarred from holding the office.

  • Pushpa Joshi appointed as Non-Executive Independent Director (Additional).
  • Appointment effective May 18, 2026, for five years, pending shareholder approval.
  • Joshi has experience in accounting, administration, and office operations.
  • She is not related to any directors and is not debarred from holding office.
  • Appointment follows Nomination and Remuneration Committee recommendation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AVI Polymers Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [TRANSFD] Transglobe Foods Board Meeting on May 27, 2026
item.description:
Transglobe Foods Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial statements and results for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window remains closed for insiders until 48 hours after the results are public.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 27, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Audited financial statements for FY26 to be reviewed and approved.
  • Trading window closed for insiders until 48 hours post result announcement.
  • Financial results include Assets, Liabilities, and Cash Flow Statement as of March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: TRANSGLOBE FOODS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [KAKATCEM] Kakatiya Cement Board Meeting on May 28, 2026
item.description:
Kakatiya Cement Sugar & Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, and to recommend a dividend. The trading window has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will reopen 48 hours after the announcement of the financial results.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Dividend recommendation to be considered at the board meeting.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, reopening post-results announcement.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 will be reviewed.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: KAKATIYA CEMENT SUGAR & INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [POLSON] Polson Ltd Board Meeting Scheduled for May 29, 2026
item.description:
Polson Ltd has announced that a meeting of its Board of Directors is scheduled for May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results and statements of the Company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the Auditor's Report. The board will also consider the appointment of Mr. Girish Gaikwad, Chartered Accountant, as an Internal Auditor for the financial year 2026-27. The trading window for trading in the company's securities has been closed from April 1, 2026, and will open 48 hours after the declaration of the audited financial results.

  • Board to consider FY26 audited standalone financial results.
  • Appointment of Internal Auditor for FY 2026-27 to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, to reopen post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: POLSON LTD. | Category: Board Meeting
